robustness_note: Robustness grid stays positive across the washer specifications.
method_note: Treatment and control are rebased to 100 before the event window. Relative effect equals treatment minus control. The 3m, 6m, and 12m values are post-tariff relative effects. Placebo tests are suggestive but underpowered.
